case.title: LAPIQUE v. DISTRICT COURT OF U S FOR SOUTHERN DIST OF CALIFORNIA

opinion.h: LAPIQUE v. DISTRICT COURT OF U S FOR SOUTHERN DIST OF CALIFORNIA, 271 U.S. 689 (1926)
John LAPIQUE, Assignee, etc., petitioner, v. The DISTRICT COURT OF THE UNITED STATES FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA et al.* No. 1224.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John Lapique, of Los Angeles, Cal., in pro. per.
Petition for a writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit denied.
[Footnote *] Rehearing denied 272 U. S. -, 47 S. Ct. 96, 71 L. Ed. -.[ Lapique v. District Court of U S for Southern Dist of California 271 U.S. 689 (1926) ]
